nasb.text: Many will seek the favor of a generous man, And every man is a friend to him who gives gifts.

esv.text: Many seek the favor of a generous man, and everyone is a friend to a man who gives gifts.

cnv.text: 尊貴的人，很多人求他的情面； 慷慨施贈的，人人都作他的朋友。

ccb.text: 大家都讨好慷慨的人， 人人都结交好施赠的。

csbs.text: 许多人恳求高贵者的情面， 每个人都是送礼之人的朋友。
